review_history.summary: Footer availability was expressed in an undeclared sibling input rather than through the required owner_footer_policy_ref contract surface.
Footer policy identity and unavailable-template state are now bound together through the declared required input, enabling a justified draft-only gap.

hard_gate_coverage.HG1: pass: AURORA keyword authority and internal-code exclusion are explicit
hard_gate_coverage.HG2: pass: supplied-only Korean business facts, action, attachment, and deadline are required
hard_gate_coverage.HG3: pass: current/superseded attachment selection is unambiguous
hard_gate_coverage.HG4: pass after revision: the declared footer-policy input supports the unavailable-template and draft-only decision
hard_gate_coverage.HG5: pass: checklist, metadata-only plan, no-send/no-Outlook-mutation, and no invented approval are covered

no_golden_finding: pass: no preferred mail body or golden phrasing is supplied; body quality is judged semantically.
revisions_made: Moved template_available=false into the declared owner_footer_policy_ref object and removed the undeclared footer_runtime_state input.
residual_gaps: No real footer template, recipient, Outlook draft, attachment payload, or send authority was inspected or exercised.
